title: [MISO]极简生电优化-Minimalist_Survival_Optimization
description: This is a relatively vanilla-friendly technical modpack with optimization features, without including mods that stray too far from the vanilla experience.
body:
This is a streamlined modpack designed for technical survival and performance optimization.
It includes essential mods for technical survival assistance, survival aids, performance optimization, and GUI customization.   

Key features include:   
     Survival Assistance  
     Technical Survival Support (featuring Masa's mod suite, Carpet mod, xk's Redstone Highlight texture pack, xareo's World Map with localization, etc.)  
     Enhanced Performance (such as faster world loading, quicker world entry, optimized rendering...)  
     Improved Gameplay Experience
     


……………………………………中文……………………………………

这是一个简单的生电和优化整合包。
整合包内含大多数生电辅助模组、生存辅助模组、优化模组、GUI 美化模组。
可以实现的功能如下： 
生存辅助；
生电辅助（masa全家桶，Carpet地毯等；xk红显材质包，xareo`s map及汉化包等）；
更好的优化（如快速加载、快速进入世界、快速渲染……）；
更好的游玩体验；
